_notes.profile: local = local MLX transcription; cloud = Azure transcription. This is for humans; speech.backend is what the app reads.
_notes.local_model: Runtime local model configuration. type selects the local engine; path is the installed model directory.
_notes.model_download: Download/install source for the selected local model type. Used only when fetching model weights.
_notes.faster_whisper: Optional CPU/local backend settings, used only when speech.backend is faster-whisper.
_notes.azure: Cloud settings. Fill endpoint and sign in from the app if speech.backend or polish.engine is azure.

azure._note: Used only for Azure speech or Azure polish.
